prompt: A highly realistic video game screenshot in the style of a Western open-world game. Third-person over-the-shoulder view of a rugged cowboy walking away from the camera, wearing a weathered brown jacket, dark pants, a gun holster, and a classic cowboy hat. To his left is a saddled dark horse with white spots. The setting is a dusty desert landscape with dry tall grass, dirt trails, cacti, and towering red rock mesas during a vibrant golden hour sunset. In the hazy background, two distant silhouetted figures stand on the dirt path. The image features a video game HUD overlay: in the bottom left corner, a circular minimap with a player arrow and two red blips; in the bottom right corner, three lines of white text with button prompt icons reading 'DRAW WEAPON [RT]', 'HORSE CARGO [Cross D-pad]', and 'TENNESSEE WALKER [LT]'.
